entry.title: New: CC 24-25 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
COUNCIL CHAIR LEE, transmitting a proposed amendment to Resolution 24-109, CD1, entitled "APPOINTMENTS TO THE BOARD OF ETHICS, BOARD OF WATER SUPPLY, CONSERVATION PLANNING COMMITTEE, COST OF GOVERNMENT COMMISSION, COUNCIL ON AGING, FIRE AND PUBLIC SAFETY COMMISSION, LIQUOR CONTROL COMMISSION, MAUI COUNTY CULTURAL RESOURCES COMMISSION, MAUI PLANNING COMMISSION, MAUI REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY, MOLOKAI PLANNING COMMISSION, PĀʻIA-HAʻIKŪ ADVISORY COMMITTEE, SOUTH MAUI ADVISORY COMMITTEE, PUBLIC WORKS COMMISSION, AND URBAN DESIGN REVIEW BOARD".

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
